curvebench_easy.description: CurveBench-Easy: foundational split containing hand-drawn images with fewer than six curves, exhaustively covering all rooted-tree topologies with up to six nodes.

level_2.description: Moderate curve count; intermediate topological complexity

level_3.description: Most complex; highest curve count in the Easy set

fields.name: image
fields.description: Hand-drawn image of disjoint curves (PIL Image, PNG or JPEG)

fields.name: num_nodes
fields.description: Number of nodes in the rooted tree, including the implicit root (outer region)

fields.name: tree
fields.description: Edge list of the rooted tree; each element is [parent, child] (0-indexed; 0 = outermost/root region)

curvebench_easy.annotation_format: Rooted tree as edge list. Root node is always 0 (outer/background region). Each inner edge [parent, child] denotes that the child region is directly contained within the parent region.
curvebench_easy.num_unique_tree_structures: All rooted-tree topologies with up to 6 nodes (exhaustive enumeration)
curvebench_easy.ground_truth_method: Automated OpenCV contour-based extraction pipeline, human-verified
curvebench_easy.notes: Total across both datasets: 756. Discrepancy note: dataset card states 756 total (300 Easy + 456 Hard). No 757 discrepancy found.

curvebench.description: CurveBench: hard evaluation split containing four categories of structurally diverse curve images (Polygon, Topographical, Maze, Counting). This dataset is also referred to as CurveBench-Hard.

Polygon.description: Non-intersecting polygon boundaries; tests robustness to sharp angles and piecewise-linear curves

Topographical.description: Inspired by real-world topographic maps; mimics elevation level sets

Maze.description: Convoluted labyrinthine curves with deep nesting; stresses long-range spatial reasoning

Counting.description: High-density curve configurations; tests scalability to large rooted trees

fields.name: image
fields.description: Hand-drawn image of disjoint curves (PIL Image, PNG)

fields.name: filename
fields.description: Original filename of the source image (e.g. '1.PNG')

fields.name: num_nodes
fields.description: Number of nodes in the rooted tree, including the implicit root (outer region)

fields.name: tree
fields.description: Stringified edge list of the rooted tree, e.g. '[(0, 1), (0, 2), (1, 3)]'. Parse with ast.literal_eval.

curvebench.annotation_format: Rooted tree as a Python-stringified list of (parent, child) integer tuples. Root node is always 0. Parse with ast.literal_eval().
curvebench.ground_truth_method: Automated OpenCV contour-based extraction pipeline, human-verified
curvebench.notes: This dataset (HuggingFace repo 'CurveBench') contains only the Hard split. Together with CurveBench-Easy (300 examples), the full benchmark totals 756 examples.

combined_benchmark.name: CurveBench (full benchmark)
combined_benchmark.evaluation_metric: Tree isomorphism (via NetworkX); binary reward (1.0 if isomorphic, 0.0 otherwise)

tree_reward.description: 1.0 if predicted tree is isomorphic to ground truth

node_count_reward.description: 1.0 if predicted node count matches ground truth
